executives.name: Giordano Albertazzi
executives.background: Giordano Albertazzi is the Chief Executive Officer of Vertiv. He was appointed CEO in January 2023. Previously, he served as President, Americas from March 2022 to December 2022 and President, Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA) from 2016 to 2022. He joined Emerson Network Power in 1998 and held various leadership positions.

executives.name: David Fallon
executives.background: David Fallon is the Chief Financial Officer of Vertiv, a position he has held since July 2017. Prior to joining Vertiv, he served as CFO at Noble International and held financial leadership roles at Textron Inc.

executives.name: Stephen Liang
executives.background: Stephen Liang is the Chief Technology Officer of Vertiv. He has been with the company and its predecessor, Emerson Network Power, since 1994. He was appointed CTO in February 2021 and previously served as President, Asia Pacific.

board_of_directors.name: David M. Cote
board_of_directors.background: David Cote is the Executive Chairman of the Board of Vertiv. He is the former Chairman and CEO of Honeywell. He also served as a Class B Director to the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph van Dokkum
board_of_directors.background: Joseph van Dokkum is an Operating Partner at Kleiner Perkins. He previously served as President of UTC Power, a division of United Technologies Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Roger Fradin
board_of_directors.background: Roger Fradin served as Vice Chairman of Honeywell and has significant experience in industrial and technology sectors. He is also a director of L3Harris Technologies.

board_of_directors.name: Jakki L. Haussler
board_of_directors.background: Jakki Haussler is the Chairman and co-founder of Opus Capital Management. She has extensive experience in financial services and investment management.
